body_transformation: The rounded head retains its soft curves with pointed ears now edged in delicate lavender petal flaps that shimmer with starlight silver. The teal body transforms into a plush ivory white with soft pastel pink leaf patterns that glow faintly like bioluminescent petals. The curled spiral tail tip becomes a smooth, tapered point covered in iridescent lavender scales that catch the light. The flower-like structure on top evolves into a crystalline bloom with delicate silver veins and a glowing starlight core, its petals translucent like spun glass.
signature_feature: Top bloom: crystalline lattice with starlight silver veins and bioluminescent core.
